subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Quds 4
subcodes.first_line: This is the Tablet of holiness from Us to him who hath believed and been guided aright, and therein is mentioned what will draw him nigh unto God
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح القدس من لدنا الی الذی امن و هدی و فیه ذکر ما یقربه الی الله العلی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @twin Manifestations
